title: Vendor in latest containers/storage
body:
This should improve performance on vfs images on top of xfs/reflink drives.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

@rhatdan Looks like we have some breaking API changes in c/image - I think @mtrmac had a PR out to address those?
Dropped containers/image, we will get it from the other PR,  Now just storage.
